markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Katherine Sebov wins the Sebov vs Brace professional tennis match in the 2026 WTA 125K Newport Round Of 32 after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Sebov vs Brace professional tennis match in the 2026 WTA 125K Newport Round Of 32 after a ball has been played. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Matt Olson records 3+ hits in the Atlanta vs Pittsburgh professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 7, 2026 at 6:40 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Matt Olson is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Matt Olson starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Matt Olson is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Matt Olson is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
markets.title: Matt Olson: 3+ hits?
